SEARCH
Package org.mvplugins.multiverse.core.config.node

Class MapConfigNode.Builder<K,V>

java.lang.Object
org.mvplugins.multiverse.core.config.node.ConfigHeaderNode.Builder<MapConfigNode.Builder<K,V>>
org.mvplugins.multiverse.core.config.node.ConfigNode.Builder<Map<K,V>,MapConfigNode.Builder<K,V>>
org.mvplugins.multiverse.core.config.node.MapConfigNode.Builder<K,V>
Type Parameters:
K - The map key type.
V - The map value type.
Enclosing class:
MapConfigNode<K,V>
@AvailableSince("5.7") public static class MapConfigNode.Builder<K,V> extends ConfigNode.Builder<Map<K,V>,MapConfigNode.Builder<K,V>>
Builder for MapConfigNode instances.

This builder extends ConfigNode.Builder with additional configuration specific to map entries: entry-level suggesters, string parsers, serializers and validators for both keys and values. When any entry-level component is omitted the builder provides a sensible default (for example default parsers, suggesters, serializers or an empty map default value).

Since:
5.7

    • Builder

      @AvailableSince("5.7") protected Builder(@NotNull @NotNull String path, @NotNull @NotNull Class<K> keyType, @NotNull @NotNull Class<V> valueType)
      Creates a new builder for a map config node.
      Parameters:
      path - The configuration path for the node.
      keyType - The runtime type of the map keys.
      valueType - The runtime type of the map values.
      Since:
      5.7

  • Method Details

    • keySuggester

      @AvailableSince("5.7") @NotNull public @NotNull MapConfigNode.Builder<K,V> keySuggester(@NotNull @NotNull NodeSuggester keySuggester)
      Sets a suggester for map keys. The suggester is used when computing tab-completion suggestions for the key part of an entry.
      Parameters:
      keySuggester - The suggester to use for keys.
      Returns:
      This builder for chaining.
      Since:
      5.7

    • keySuggester

      @AvailableSince("5.7") @NotNull public @NotNull MapConfigNode.Builder<K,V> keySuggester(@NotNull @NotNull SenderNodeSuggester keySuggester)
      Sets a sender-aware suggester for map keys. Use this when suggestions depend on the command sender (permissions, location, etc.).
      Parameters:
      keySuggester - The sender-aware suggester.
      Returns:
      This builder for chaining.
      Since:
      5.7

    • valueSuggester

      @AvailableSince("5.7") @NotNull public @NotNull MapConfigNode.Builder<K,V> valueSuggester(@NotNull @NotNull NodeSuggester valueSuggester)
      Sets a suggester for map values. The suggester is used when computing tab-completion suggestions for the value part of an entry.
      Parameters:
      valueSuggester - The suggester to use for values.
      Returns:
      This builder for chaining.
      Since:
      5.7

    • valueSuggester

      @AvailableSince("5.7") @NotNull public @NotNull MapConfigNode.Builder<K,V> valueSuggester(@NotNull @NotNull SenderNodeSuggester valueSuggester)
      Sets a sender-aware suggester for map values. Use this when value suggestions depend on the command sender.
      Parameters:
      valueSuggester - The sender-aware suggester.
      Returns:
      This builder for chaining.
      Since:
      5.7

    • keyStringParser

      @AvailableSince("5.7") @NotNull public @NotNull MapConfigNode.Builder<K,V> keyStringParser(@NotNull @NotNull NodeStringParser<K> keyStringParser)
      Sets the string parser for keys. The parser is used when parsing user-provided key strings into key instances (e.g. when parsing a map from a single-line string representation).
      Parameters:
      keyStringParser - The parser to use for keys.
      Returns:
      This builder for chaining.
      Since:
      5.7

    • keyStringParser

      @AvailableSince("5.7") @NotNull public @NotNull MapConfigNode.Builder<K,V> keyStringParser(@NotNull @NotNull SenderNodeStringParser<K> keyStringParser)
      Sets a sender-aware string parser for keys. Use this when parsing depends on the sender context.
      Parameters:
      keyStringParser - The sender-aware key parser.
      Returns:
      This builder for chaining.
      Since:
      5.7

    • valueStringParser

      @AvailableSince("5.7") @NotNull public @NotNull MapConfigNode.Builder<K,V> valueStringParser(@NotNull @NotNull NodeStringParser<V> valueStringParser)
      Sets the string parser for values. The parser converts the textual part after '=' in an entry into the value type.
      Parameters:
      valueStringParser - The parser to use for values.
      Returns:
      This builder for chaining.
      Since:
      5.7

    • valueStringParser

      @AvailableSince("5.7") @NotNull public @NotNull MapConfigNode.Builder<K,V> valueStringParser(@NotNull @NotNull SenderNodeStringParser<V> valueStringParser)

      Parameters:
      valueStringParser - The sender-aware value parser.
      Returns:
      This builder for chaining.

      5.7

    • keySerializer

      @AvailableSince("5.7") @NotNull public @NotNull MapConfigNode.Builder<K,V> keySerializer(@NotNull @NotNull NodeSerializer<K> keySerializer)
      Sets the serializer for keys. Serializers convert keys to/from persisted forms stored in the configuration backend.
      Parameters:
      keySerializer - The key serializer.
      Returns:
      This builder for chaining.
      Since:
      5.7

    • keyValidator

      @AvailableSince("5.7") @NotNull public @NotNull MapConfigNode.Builder<K,V> keyValidator(@NotNull @NotNull Function<K,io.vavr.control.Try<Void>> keyValidator)
      Sets a validator for keys. The validator should return a successful Try for valid keys or a failed Try describing the validation error for invalid keys.
      Parameters:
      keyValidator - The key validator.
      Returns:
      This builder for chaining.
      Since:
      5.7

      Parameters:
      valueValidator - The value validator.
      Returns:
      This builder for chaining.
